nodes.name: RESPOND TO WEBHOOK
nodes.notes: send the response to client side (react app)

parameters.content:
## CM Task Monitoring

**Purpose:**
- The purpose of this workflow is to retrieve all tasks from each Microsoft To Do list for every member.

## Important URL
**Website URL**:
https://neightn-booking.indie-demo.com/task-monitoring

**Webhook URL testing**:
https://neightn.indie-demo.com/webhook-test/cm-task-monitoring

**Webhook URL Production**:
https://neightn.indie-demo.com/webhook/cm-task-monitoring

## Documentation
- This workflow is triggered when the user clicks the Monitor button on the /task-monitoring page.

- Retrieve each user's Microsoft To Do lists.

- Retrieve all tasks under each list.

- Send the retrieved data to the react app for display.

**Important Notes:**

- Do not forget to include the username in the important fields node

- Ignore any lists that do not contain any tasks

- Ignore any tasks that were not created in the current year
